stemHtml: ICAO publications – Standards defined in the Annexes to the Chicago convention are...

options.a: advice and guidance for the aviation related legislation within the legal framework of the Contracting States.
options.b: recommended explanatory material for the aviation related legislation of the Contracting States.
options.c: binding for all Contracting States without deviation or exception.
options.d: binding for the Contracting States unless they have notified ICAO about a national difference.
